calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-31-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Daniel Byrne for Stephen Wolf and Katie Wolf.

The Court inquired why the court needs to get involved. Mr. Byrne stated the beneficiary was advised by another lawyer, that the codicil is in-effective, that he is trying to comply with that person's intent to get property to son, and that there is concern of parent to child exclusion with the assessor.

The Court granted the Petition to Compel Modifications of Trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-23-2019 Continued To Oct-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
